working_on: Phase 1.5.4 — rendering-policy voice-discipline closure: extend ADR 0027 forbidden-token enumeration with globe/world/map/territory/exploration + reward/trophy/glow/mastery-visualization categories; mirror in AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md; light-revise ADRs 0012 + 0014; sweep ~10 secondary docs for residual globe/glow/tendril/trophy framing; mark globe/trophy tension entries Resolved: 2026-04-30. Phase 1.5 closes at S-0016.
outcome_summary: Phase 1.5.4 closed; Phase 1.5 fully closed. ADR 0027 forbidden-token enumeration extended with globe/spatial-traversal + reward/visualization categories per ADRs 0033/0034 (cheap-amendment direction; Status remains Accepted). AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md mirrors with two new bullets and worked-example annotation extension (second failing-version + acceptable rephrasing illustrating bridge-surfacing-in-context). ADR 0012 light-revised (residual market framing stripped; freshman-defaults builder-bias-protection role named explicitly per ADR 0032 preserved through ADR 0035). ADR 0014 light-revised (S-0016 audit confirmed no cohort residual; See-also expanded). ADRs 0006/0007/0028 swept of residual globe-rendering examples and exit-affordance globe-view references. 8 docs swept (architecture.md, pedagogy.md, learner-model.md, infrastructure.md, pedagogy/inferences.md, prep-paideia-prompt-pack.md, README.md, tensions.md). Tension entries marked Resolved: 2026-04-30 per discipline (entries preserved; original prose in git history). Sweep terminates with zero in-prose residual references implying the prior reward/globe design is active; STATE.md exception list extended pragmatically (recorded honestly in CHANGELOG): also includes ADR 0034, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md, adr/README.md, ui-architecture.md, session-lifecycle.md, AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md, plus S-0016 sweep-attribution prose in edited files. ADR count unchanged at 35 (33 Accepted + 2 Superseded). tools/validate.py clean across all 5 commits (0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns). 5 commits + main FF + push: c554019 (eager-claim), 9d327ed (ADR 0027 + AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS), bf5afe8 (ADRs 0012 + 0014 light revisions), 161b408 (ADR sweep 0006/0007/0028), 138399d (docs sweep + tensions). STATE.md updated with S-0017 work item (Phase 2 — Build Plan Scaffolding opens; build_plan/ directory deliverable; per-phase chunks consume the realigned contract). CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased] for S-0016 records all changes plus the by-design-exception extension.
